text:
Ikari may refer to:
Shinji Ikari, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.
Gendo Ikari (Birth Name: Gendo Rokubungi), a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.
Yui Ikari (Birth Name: Yui Ayanami), a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Shinji Ikari, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 
Gendo Ikari, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 
Yui Ikari, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 

Shinji Ikari, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. 
Gendo Ikari, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. 
Yui Ikari (Birth Name: Yui Ayanami), a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
